set.body:
Child of bd-01KXZQCRJQ02WXW3PRY5BTQY5K.

Goal: establish measured evidence before generalizing destination and workspace APIs.

Scope and acceptance:
- Profile repeated dense GEMM and add/scale pipelines, QR and representative spectral calls, and repeated sparse structural/numeric operations.
- Record JVM allocation counts where reliable and Scala.js construction/reuse counters plus timing evidence.
- Rank concrete hot paths by avoidable allocation and expected downstream leverage.
- Define per-path acceptance budgets and crossover criteria for later child issues.
- Check in a reproducible benchmark or evidence receipt.
- Make no public API changes in this issue.
set.title: Profile allocation hot spots and set reuse acceptance budgets
